description: MCP server for Kaseya VSA RMM — agents, patches, procedures, alarms, tickets.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/kaseya-vsa-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Local-auth username (omit if using Kaseya One token)
environmentVariables.name: KASEYA_VSA_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Local-auth password (omit if using Kaseya One token)
environmentVariables.name: KASEYA_VSA_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Kaseya One SSO token (alternative to username + password)
environmentVariables.name: KASEYA_VSA_K1_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Kaseya VSA
